Multi-Model LLM Benchmark Report

MTC Structured Extraction — Visual Model Comparison

Published

March 9, 2026

1 Overview

This report compares all benchmarked language models on Mill Test Certificate (MTC) structured extraction accuracy. Four models have confirmed results via GitHub Models; Qwen2.5 models are available via the HuggingFace Inference API.

Models are scored against a human-annotated ground truth on five dimensions:

Dimension Metric
Document fields Exact-match accuracy (5 fields)
Chemical composition Heat-number F1 + per-element accuracy
Mechanical properties Row F1 + per-property accuracy
Approval Exact-match accuracy
Overall Weighted mean of all component F1s 
Summary has 10 model entries.
Ground truth loaded: True
Successful models: 4
Failed models:     6

2 Model Registry

3 Grouped Bar Chart — Quality per Section

Each cluster of bars represents one model; bar colour encodes the metric dimension.

4 Radar / Spider Chart — Overall Quality Profile

Each polygon represents one model across five quality axes.

5 Latency vs Quality Scatter

Bubble size = total token usage. Models in the upper-left corner offer the best quality-per-second trade-off.

6 Token Usage & Estimated Cost

Stacked bars show prompt (left) and completion (right) token usage. Estimated costs use public API pricing — GitHub Models and HuggingFace serverless inference are free in Codespaces / on free tier (shown as $0.00).

7 Per-Field Accuracy Heatmap

Rows = models; columns = individual metrics. Colour intensity shows accuracy (0 = red, 1 = green).

7.1 Document Field Detail

Per-field exact-match results for each successful model.

8 Error / Failure Breakdown

Models that failed during the benchmark run (endpoint unavailable, unknown model ID, etc.).

9 How to Add New Models

9.1 HuggingFace Models (Qwen2.5, etc.)

  1. Get a HuggingFace token: https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens (free account, read access is sufficient for serverless inference).
  2. Set the env var: export HF_TOKEN=hf_... or add it as a Codespace secret.
  3. Run with the HF provider flag:
# Qwen2.5-72B only, with ground-truth evaluation, 1 s sleep between pages
python src/extraction/llm_models_extraction.py \
    --use-cached-ocr \
    --models "Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct" \
    --ground-truth data/ground_truth/diler-07-07-2025-rerun-41-44_gt.json \
    --rate-limit-sleep 1.0
  1. Render this report after the run to see the new model appear in every chart:
quarto render benchmark_report.qmd

9.2 GitHub Models (new model IDs)

Add an entry to RANKED_MODELS in src/extraction/llm_models_extraction.py with the correct id, label, provider, tier, base_url (https://models.inference.ai.azure.com), and api_key_env (GITHUB_TOKEN). Then run as normal.

Report generated with Quarto. Evaluation logic: src/evaluation/evaluator.py.
